steps.title: Identify the contrast in voting requirements
steps.content: The passage presents Ethiopia's voting age requirement (18) then pivots to Cuba's requirement (16). This relationship between the two facts is inherently comparative — we're contrasting two different voting ages across two countries.

steps.title: Match the transition to the relationship
steps.content:
”By comparison” directly marks a comparison between two things — Ethiopia's voting age versus Cuba's.

The other three choices misidentify the relationship: “Firstly” implies a sequence or list, “Therefore” suggests causation between the requirements, and “For example” treats Cuba as an instance illustrating a general rule rather than a contrasting case.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
